sourceSummary.oneLine: Product drawing for G1717CW BLUE_MAIN_ASSY, part number ASM-000107, with material weight, release date, dimensional tolerances, approvals, and parts list.
sourceSummary.officialUse: DHF mechanical design/product drawing record for BLUE_MAIN_ASSY assembly.
keyPoints: Part number ASM-000107 is identified for G1717CW BLUE_MAIN_ASSY.
The drawing states release date 2025. 02. 24 and unit mm.
Parts list includes seven items: BLUE_MAIN_PBA, BLUE_BATTERY_PBA, BLUE_MAIN_PBA_COLUMN_STICKER, BLUE_FILM_PROTECTION_PET_POWER, BLUE_FILM_PROTECTION_PET_MAIN, BLUE_IMX8_PBA, and BLUE_XDAQ_PBA.
Prepared, checked, and approved by SH.MAENG, IH.HWANG, and TH.LEE respectively, each dated 2025. 02. 24.
